markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce GrowthX's AI-powered content creation services to Finder and explore potential collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/7szGy5FshhDytsiJqEYoWwBufVPTPw6P?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers AI-driven content creation with human oversight, focusing on high-quality, SEO-optimized content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/7szGy5FshhDytsiJqEYoWwBufVPTPw6P?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [Pricing starts at $15K/month for execution phase after a $20K strategy sprint, with potential for customization](https://fathom.video/share/7szGy5FshhDytsiJqEYoWwBufVPTPw6P?tab=summary&timestamp=1919.0)
  - [Finder is interested in AI-first content creation to increase output and reduce costs, but wants visibility into the process](https://fathom.video/share/7szGy5FshhDytsiJqEYoWwBufVPTPw6P?tab=summary&timestamp=2460.0)
  - [GrowthX's workflow and platform are proprietary, but they collaborate closely with clients on strategy and content approval](https://fathom.video/share/7szGy5FshhDytsiJqEYoWwBufVPTPw6P?tab=summary&timestamp=2538.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Service Overview

  - [Combines AI-powered workflows with expert human oversight](https://fathom.video/share/7szGy5FshhDytsiJqEYoWwBufVPTPw6P?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [Focus on editorial content (10-15 pieces/week) and programmatic content (50-75 pages/week at higher tiers)](https://fathom.video/share/7szGy5FshhDytsiJqEYoWwBufVPTPw6P?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)
  - [Uses modular workflows adaptable to different AI models (e.g., Claude for article generation)](https://fathom.video/share/7szGy5FshhDytsiJqEYoWwBufVPTPw6P?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)
  - [Offers end-to-end service from strategy to content creation and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/7szGy5FshhDytsiJqEYoWwBufVPTPw6P?tab=summary&timestamp=1270.0)

### Pricing and Engagement Structure

  - [Strategy sprint: $20K upfront for 6-8 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/7szGy5FshhDytsiJqEYoWwBufVPTPw6P?tab=summary&timestamp=1884.0)
  - [Execution phase: Starts at $15K/month, rarely exceeds $30K/month](https://fathom.video/share/7szGy5FshhDytsiJqEYoWwBufVPTPw6P?tab=summary&timestamp=1958.0)
  - [12-month agreement with opt-out option after strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/7szGy5FshhDytsiJqEYoWwBufVPTPw6P?tab=summary&timestamp=1946.0)
  - [Includes all compute and API costs](https://fathom.video/share/7szGy5FshhDytsiJqEYoWwBufVPTPw6P?tab=summary&timestamp=2240.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Develops "Content OS" with detailed keyword and topic strategy](https://fathom.video/share/7szGy5FshhDytsiJqEYoWwBufVPTPw6P?tab=summary&timestamp=2580.0)
  - [Uses Airtable for content tracking, Slack for communication, and Notion for documentation](https://fathom.video/share/7szGy5FshhDytsiJqEYoWwBufVPTPw6P?tab=summary&timestamp=2688.0)
  - [Calibration process to ensure content meets client standards](https://fathom.video/share/7szGy5FshhDytsiJqEYoWwBufVPTPw6P?tab=summary&timestamp=2730.0)
  - [Flexible review process based on client preferences](https://fathom.video/share/7szGy5FshhDytsiJqEYoWwBufVPTPw6P?tab=summary&timestamp=2746.0)

### GrowthX vs. Competitors (e.g., AirOps)

  - [GrowthX focuses on service delivery rather than providing a self-serve platform](https://fathom.video/share/7szGy5FshhDytsiJqEYoWwBufVPTPw6P?tab=summary&timestamp=2298.0)
  - [Currently doesn't offer direct access to workflows, but considering future options](https://fathom.video/share/7szGy5FshhDytsiJqEYoWwBufVPTPw6P?tab=summary&timestamp=2298.0)
  - [Emphasizes collaboration and strategy over purely technical solution](https://fathom.video/share/7szGy5FshhDytsiJqEYoWwBufVPTPw6P?tab=summary&timestamp=2298.0)

### Finder's Interests and Concerns

  - [Seeking AI-first approach to rebuild content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/7szGy5FshhDytsiJqEYoWwBufVPTPw6P?tab=summary&timestamp=2409.0)
  - [Interested in increasing output while reducing headcount/costs](https://fathom.video/share/7szGy5FshhDytsiJqEYoWwBufVPTPw6P?tab=summary&timestamp=2112.0)
  - [Wants visibility into content creation process and ability to influence workflows](https://fathom.video/share/7szGy5FshhDytsiJqEYoWwBufVPTPw6P?tab=summary&timestamp=2409.0)
  - [Values GrowthX's experience across multiple clients](https://fathom.video/share/7szGy5FshhDytsiJqEYoWwBufVPTPw6P?tab=summary&timestamp=2600.0)

## Next Steps

  - GrowthX to send proposal and Statement of Work (SOW) to Finder
  - [Schedule follow-up call on Friday at 2 PM Pacific (Saturday 7 AM for Jeremy) to review proposal](https://fathom.video/share/7szGy5FshhDytsiJqEYoWwBufVPTPw6P?tab=summary&timestamp=2998.0)
  - [GrowthX to create Slack channel for ongoing communication](https://fathom.video/share/7szGy5FshhDytsiJqEYoWwBufVPTPw6P?tab=summary&timestamp=2906.0)
  - [Explore specific content opportunities for Finder based on website analysis](https://fathom.video/share/7szGy5FshhDytsiJqEYoWwBufVPTPw6P?tab=summary&timestamp=2923.0)
